metadata.description: 自然语言处理: NLP enables computers to understand, generate, and process human language. Here is a brief Python code example using the `nltk` library for tokenizing text, which is a fundamental step in natural language processing: ```python import nltk # Sample text text = "Natural Language Processing (NLP) enables computers to understand, generate, and process human language." # Tokenize the text into words tokens = nltk.word_tokenize(text) print(tokens) ``` This code imports the `nltk` library, tokenizes a sample text into individual words using `word_tokenize`, and prints the tokens.
